antibot.verdict: No anti-bot challenge for anonymous requests. Plain httpx with Chrome UA returns HTTP 200 directly.

httpx_direct.verdict: VERIFIED: httpx direct works without any proxy or Playwright

httpx_proxy.verdict: VERIFIED: proxy also works but NOT NEEDED

category_ids.41: Скрипты, боты и mini apps — BEST MATCH: Python/ML/parsing/bots (41 projects)
category_ids.79: Верстка (HTML/CSS layouts) — NOT ML/AI (report claim WRONG)
category_ids.4158119: Машинное обучение (subcategory of 41, not a standalone filter)
category_ids.NOTE_cat11_as_filter: c=11 returns mixed categories (38,37,40,41,80,81) — it is a parent-group filter not a leaf

report_claim_corrections.cat_11_python: WRONG — cat 11 is the parent group ID for Программирование, not Python leaf. Using c=11 returns 136 mixed projects across all sub-categories.
report_claim_corrections.cat_79_ml_ai: WRONG — cat 79 is Верстка (HTML/CSS layouts). Returns only 3 landing page projects. NOT ML/AI.
report_claim_corrections.correct_for_python_ml: Use c=41 (Скрипты, боты и mini apps) — returns Python, parsing, AI bot projects. 41 projects total.
report_claim_corrections.cloudflare_claim: WRONG — protection is QRATOR (Russian WAF), not Cloudflare Turnstile.
report_claim_corrections.httpx_blocked: WRONG — plain httpx with Chrome UA works directly. No JS challenge.

project_card_anonymous.how: SSR renders title in <title> and <meta description>; priceLimit/dates in JS data in HTML body
project_card_anonymous.verdict: VERIFIED: project card is fully accessible anonymously

monitoring_approach.dedup_key: id (numeric project ID, same as want_id in mobile API)

playwright_verdict.note: Playwright is NOT needed since httpx direct works. Stealth Playwright also works (confirmed headless, no proxy needed).
